title: Create:MR
description: add recipes for the create mod so far just 3
body:
add recipes for the create mod so far just 3

 

the recipes are one raw copper one raw iron for 3 zinc heated in a mixer just away to get, more in case you cant find some

 

spout some lava on magma block you get veridium in case you cant find some for your build, same logic for asurine but water instead of lava

 

you can turn clay into molton clay by puting one clay into a basin heated it turn into molton clay which when spouted on a clay ball it turns in to 4 bricks better way of brick in case your runing short and require more for your build


and cardboard items can turn into pulp

one raw zinc one raw iron heated in a blaze burner gets you 4 andisite alloy
